_finding: Resolution state (resolved/resolved_by/resolved_at) is exposed directly on the REST discussions/notes resource -- no separate GraphQL-only path is documented as required, UNLIKE GitHub where isResolved is GraphQL-only. This asymmetry (GitLab: REST suffices; GitHub: GraphQL required) is itself a normalization finding for the port. NOT independently confirmed against a live GitLab instance in this spike -- see findings.md three-valued disclosure.
